title: AI Leadership — CEO Insights Compilation
description: Sam Altman + Satya Nadella on AI capabilities, companies, and the future of work

clips.note: Sam Altman — 100x capability vision (OpenAI Town Hall, Jan 2026). Quote: 'Assume we will have a model that is 100 times more capable...' — VERIFY TIMESTAMP
Sam Altman — GPT-5 level intelligence at 100x less cost (Town Hall). Quote: 'GPT-5.2-level intelligence by end of 2027 for at least 100x less' — VERIFY TIMESTAMP
Sam Altman — Full AI companies (Cisco AI Summit, Feb 3 2026). Quote: 'The upper limit, I think, is full AI companies.' — VERIFY TIMESTAMP
Sam Altman — AI co-workers warning (Cisco AI Summit). Quote: 'Companies not set up to adopt AI co-workers will be at a huge disadvantage.' — VERIFY TIMESTAMP

Sam Altman — Models will change what it means to run a company (Morgan Stanley TMT / India AI Summit). Quote: 'Models coming out in the next few months will change what it means to run a good company.' — VERIFY TIMESTAMP
Satya Nadella — Managers of infinite minds (WEF Davos, Jan 2026). Quote: 'All of us are going to be managers of infinite minds.' — VERIFY TIMESTAMP
Satya Nadella — LinkedIn full-stack builders role (WEF Davos). Biggest structural change to software teams in his career. — VERIFY TIMESTAMP
Satya Nadella — 2026 as the diffusion year. Quote: 'We have moved past initial discovery and are entering widespread diffusion.' — VERIFY TIMESTAMP
Satya Nadella — From models to systems with scaffolds, memory, agents. — VERIFY TIMESTAMP
